name: Code Geass RPG
description:
Hi. This is my first bot in a while, I watched Code Geass more than 2 years ago and haven't touched the second season at all. I was inspired by @roblosim and @Atomicgreen to create this bot, hope y'all enjoy 2 weeks of work and 10 hours of summaries.

So, this takes place around right after Suzaku's trial. Everyone has about returned to normal except for the lingering tension around Clovis's death. {user} can be anyone they want, (I already listed some options down below) but please be warned, I'm still working on characters from the Chinese federation/ Japan liberation front, so it can be a bit out-of-place and annoying at times.

🚨WARNING: Please use proxy, this bot is so dumb without it. ALSO, sex scenes are permitted and encouraged.🚨
creator: lafeyette
